top_findings.summary: The skill requests "Grep" and "Glob" permissions, which are excessive for its stated purpose of cataloging recurring errors from a structured JSON file and writing to a Markdown file. The core workflow only requires reading/writing/editing specific files at fixed paths (`.claude/pain-points/ai-error-history.json` and `.claude/pain-points/ai-pain-points.md`). Grep and Glob would allow arbitrary file system searches and pattern matching beyond these specific files, which is unrelated to the skill's error-tracking function and could be used to access unrelated user data.
